content.full_text:
February 21, 1990

Linda Moureaux
California Fair Political Practices Commission
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Dear Linda:

I need to know if a "non-voting" member of our Executive Committee would be required to file an annual Form 730.

Our nine-member Executive Committee is elected from the general board of directors, and as directors they do file the annual Form 730. However, we recently changed our governing documents to increase our Executive Committee to ten members. The tenth member is the Vice-President of an associate organization. Membership in this associate organization is a prerequisite to membership in our organization.

The tenth member is a director on his own water district's board and does file the Form 730 under that district's conflict of interest code.

Please let me know if I must have him file under our code as well.

Sincerely,

Sylvia Briseno
Conference & Publications Director
